description: Rust port of R's `relaimpo::calc.relimp(type="lmg")` (exact Shapley), `iopsych::relWt` (Johnson's ε), plus a Castro–Gómez–Tejada sampled Shapley for medium-p. Auto-detects categorical predictors and one-hot expands them; Shapley enumerates over original variable groups, not dummies. Outputs per-variable ε summing to R².
